nodes.name: Cisticola
nodes.summary: Cisticola（Cisticola）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联53种鸟类，如Whistling cisticola、Chattering cisticola、Trilling cisticola等53种鸟类。

nodes.name: Pale-crowned cisticola
nodes.summary: The pale-crowned cisticola (Cisticola cinnamomeus) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. Taxonomy Cisticola cinnamomeus was split from Cisticola brunnescens (pectoral-patch cisticola); since 2000 it has been recognised as a separate species by most world bird-listing authorities. Distribution It is found in Africa from eastern South Africa to Gabon and Tanzania. Habitat Its natural habitats are damp or marshy areas in upland grassland. References External links Pectoral-patch cisticola - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
